abilities.description: Transform CARDNAME. Activate only as a sorcery. ({W/P} can be paid with either {W} or 2 life.)

effect.description: Transform CARDNAME. Activate only as a sorcery. ({W/P} can be paid with either {W} or 2 life.)
effect.name: SetState

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, each player mills three cards.
When this creature transforms into CARDNAME, put target permanent card with mana value 2 or less from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.
